item.title: Workshop Expansion in Progress
item.description: A growing workshop undergoes expansion to support larger projects and equipment. What improvements come with a bigger workspace?

media:content.media:title: Workshop Expansion in Progress
media:content.media:description: A growing workshop undergoes expansion to support larger projects and equipment. What improvements come with a bigger workspace?

item.title: Setting Up a Metal Spray System
item.description: An innovative metal spray system is prepared for use in repair and restoration work. How does this process improve worn components?

media:content.media:title: Setting Up a Metal Spray System
media:content.media:description: An innovative metal spray system is prepared for use in repair and restoration work. How does this process improve worn components?

item.title: Drilling and Tapping Lathe Chuck Jaws
item.description: Precision drilling and tapping work is carried out on hard jaws for a lathe chuck setup. What techniques help maintain accuracy during machining?

media:content.media:title: Drilling and Tapping Lathe Chuck Jaws
media:content.media:description: Precision drilling and tapping work is carried out on hard jaws for a lathe chuck setup. What techniques help maintain accuracy during machining?

item.title: Crack Testing an Industrial Spindle
item.description: A spindle undergoes crack testing to inspect for wear and structural issues in a workshop setting. Why is early detection so important in heavy machining?

media:content.media:title: Crack Testing an Industrial Spindle
media:content.media:description: A spindle undergoes crack testing to inspect for wear and structural issues in a workshop setting. Why is early detection so important in heavy machining?

item.title: First-time lathe service
item.description: Performing a first-time service on a lathe, focusing on maintenance, inspection, and restoring smooth operation. What should always be checked before putting a machine back to work?

media:content.media:title: First-time lathe service
media:content.media:description: Performing a first-time service on a lathe, focusing on maintenance, inspection, and restoring smooth operation. What should always be checked before putting a machine back to work?

item.title: Inspecting old seals in the workshop
item.description: A closer look at worn and aging seals to identify damage, wear patterns, and possible causes of failure. What can old seals reveal about machine condition?

media:content.media:title: Inspecting old seals in the workshop
media:content.media:description: A closer look at worn and aging seals to identify damage, wear patterns, and possible causes of failure. What can old seals reveal about machine condition?

item.title: Emergency Cylinder Repair on a CAT 988G
item.description: A time-sensitive hydraulic cylinder repair on a Caterpillar 988G to get heavy equipment back into operation quickly. What challenges come with urgent field repairs?

media:content.media:title: Emergency Cylinder Repair on a CAT 988G
media:content.media:description: A time-sensitive hydraulic cylinder repair on a Caterpillar 988G to get heavy equipment back into operation quickly. What challenges come with urgent field repairs?

item.title: WS2 Plus line boring restores worn thrust faces
item.description: Using the WS2 Plus line boring system to restore worn thrust faces and bring critical components back within specification. How does precision machining extend equipment life?

media:content.media:title: WS2 Plus line boring restores worn thrust faces
media:content.media:description: Using the WS2 Plus line boring system to restore worn thrust faces and bring critical components back within specification. How does precision machining extend equipment life?

item.title: Testing a Shop-Made Big Boring Bar
item.description: Putting a custom-built boring bar to the test under real machining conditions. Does it deliver the strength and accuracy needed for the job?

item.title: Broaching keyways for a tool post grinder
item.description: Precision broaching of keyways to ensure proper fit and alignment in a tool post grinder setup. What makes this process so critical for performance?

item.title: 730 Dump Truck A-frame Eye Repair
item.description: Rebuilding a worn A-frame eye on a 730 dump truck to bring it back within spec. How do heavy repairs like this restore structural integrity?

media:content.media:description: Rebuilding a worn A-frame eye on a 730 dump truck to bring it back within spec. How do heavy repairs like this restore structural integrity?

item.title: Repairing a cracked weld in a hydraulic cylinder
item.description: A damaged weld in a hydraulic cylinder is carefully repaired to restore strength and reliability. What steps ensure a long-lasting fix?

media:content.media:description: A damaged weld in a hydraulic cylinder is carefully repaired to restore strength and reliability. What steps ensure a long-lasting fix?

item.title: Urgent Barrel Repair
item.description: A time-sensitive repair on a hydraulic cylinder barrel, focusing on precision work to restore function quickly. What steps are critical when speed and accuracy both matter?

item.title: Inspecting a Broken Cylinder Rod
item.description: A detailed inspection of a damaged cylinder rod to identify failure points and determine the best repair approach. What caused the break, and can it be fixed?

item.title: Metal arc spraying a D11 yoke
item.description: Restoring a worn D11 dozer yoke using metal arc spraying to rebuild surfaces and extend component life. How does this process bring heavy parts back to spec?
